docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MARTINIUC, ADELINA MIRELA AS TO DEFENDANT THE GUARDIAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA, NEW YORK,NY. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINIUC, ADELINA MIRELA AS TO DEFENDANT THE GUARDIAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA, NEW YORK,NY.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-04-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE GUARDIAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA, NEW YORK,NY.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PER PHONE CONVERSATION WITH PLAINTIFF ADELINA MIRELA MARTINIUC SHE CONVEYED TO THE CLERK THAT DEFENDANT THE GUARDIAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA HAS SETTLED THE CASE (SIGNED AN AGREEMENT) WITH HER AND THAT BOTH PARTIES WILL NOT BE APPEARING IN COURT TODAY. VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. NO APPEARANCES BY ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
